mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kg_favorites(user_id, resource_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{resourceId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE created_at = VALUES(created_at)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM kg_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND resource_id = #{resourceId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM kg_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND resource_id = #{resourceId}
